chunks.text: Page 1 of 1 ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR C. P No. D – 302 of 2024 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge Hearing of case For hearing of main case 30.05.2024 Mr. Ihsan Ali Lund Baloch, Advocate along with petitioner Mr. Zulfiqar Ali Naich, Assistant Advocate General Sindh >>>>>..<<<<< Mr. Shamsuddin Rajper, Advocate has filed power on behalf of respondents No.6. Azhar Abbasi and Ayaz Ali, Chairman and Secretary, Union Council, Baki Khan (Respondents No.6&7) are present. They undertake that by tomorrow half of the entire arrears of the pensionary benefits in shape of a cross cheque will be given to petitioner and remaining half would be paid to him in the first week of July, not later than 10th July, 2024. The petitioner and his counsel are satisfied and this petition is disposed of accordingly in above terms. Judge Judge ARBROHI
